title: ingress.ready
description: Published by a receiver after a chunk has landed in bronze and GCS. Consumed by the streaming consumer to begin ELT processing.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Incremented only on breaking changes.

trace_id.description: Unique identifier for this ingress event. Propagates through every stage.

tenant_id.description: Tenant identifier. Used as Pub/Sub ordering key.

source_id.description: Source registration identifier (POS type, ERP type, etc.).

bronze_ref.description: Foreign key into the bronze metadata table.

gcs_uri.description: Full GCS URI of the raw payload. Path scheme enforced by libs/dis-storage.

received_ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the receiver accepted the request.

replay.description: True if this is a replay (Ithina-side or tenant-side). False or absent for fresh ingress.

parent_trace_id.description: If replay=true, the trace_id of the original event. Optional.
